<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep changes focused; see CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check` and `uv run ruff format --check` pass
- [ ] `uv run pyright` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes; tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/config changed
- [ ] No secrets in code, tests, or examples
